text: - (c) Upon  completion  of  the  Subcontract  Work  and  as  a  condition  of  final  payment  therefor, Subcontractor agrees to furnish a letter  from  the  manufacturer(s)  of  all  major  pieces  of  equipment  furnished  by Subcontractor,  stating  that  the  installation  thereof  has  been  done  in  accordance  with  recommendation  of  said manufacturer(s) and that said manufacturer(s) will honor any and all warranties and/or guarantees normally given on their equipment.
